hyperedges.label: MapView orchestrates all UI state, location, and place data
Overpass data pipeline: build query → fetch with retry → parse to Place[]
Panic mode: escalating radius search → nearest sort → Google Maps redirect
Global app state shared across all control components via AppContext
Place display pipeline: Place data → haversine dist → isOpenNow → PlaceMarker popup
